items.title_en: Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise of open source LiteLLM project
items.title_zh: Mercor 称遭受与开源 LiteLLM 项目被入侵相关的网络攻击
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：这家 AI 招聘初创公司确认了一起安全事件，此前一个勒索黑客组织声称从该公司系统窃取了数据。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: The AI recruiting startup confirmed a security incident after an extortion hacking crew took credit for stealing data from the company's systems.

items.title_en: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
items.title_zh: Salesforce 为 Slack 宣布 AI 重磅更新，包含 30 项新功能
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Slack 刚刚变得更加有用了，Salesforce 为其推出了 30 项 AI 新功能。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Slack just got a whole lot more useful with 30 new AI features announced by Salesforce.

items.title_en: Accelerating the next phase of AI
items.title_zh: 加速 AI 的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI 筹集 1220 亿美元新资金，用于在全球扩展前沿 AI、投资下一代计算，并满足对 ChatGPT、Codex 和企业 AI 日益增长的需求。
items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.

items.title_en: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident
items.title_zh: Anthropic 误删数千个 GitHub 仓库以撤回泄露的源代码，公司称这是意外
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Anthropic 高管表示这是一次意外，并已撤回大部分下架通知。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.

items.title_en: Cognichip wants AI to design the chips that power AI, and just raised $60M to try
items.title_zh: Cognichip 希望用 AI 设计驱动 AI 的芯片，刚刚融资 6000 万美元
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：该公司表示可以将芯片开发成本降低 75% 以上，并将时间缩短一半以上。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: The firm says it can reduce the cost of chip development by more than 75% and cut the timeline by more than half.

items.title_en: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
items.title_zh: Gradient Labs 为每位银行客户提供 AI 账户经理
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：Gradient Labs 使用 GPT-4.1 和 GPT-5.4 mini 及 nano 来驱动 AI 代理，以低延迟和高可靠性自动化银行支持工作流。
items.summary_en: OpenAI: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.

items.title_en: Meta's natural gas binge could power South Dakota
items.title_zh: Meta 的天然气消耗足以为南达科他州供电
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Meta 即将建成的 Hyperion AI 数据中心将由 10 座新的天然气发电厂提供动力。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Meta's upcoming Hyperion AI data center will be powered by 10 new natural gas plants.
